description: generatePDF with invoiceId calls getInvoiceHtml and returns PDF buffer
generatePDF with quoteId calls getQuoteHtml and returns PDF buffer
generatePDF with documentId calls getDocumentHtml and returns PDF buffer
generatePDF throws when no id provided
generateAndStore with invoiceId persists PDF and publishes DOCUMENT_GENERATED event
generateAndStore with quoteId persists PDF and publishes DOCUMENT_GENERATED event
generateAndStore with documentId persists PDF and publishes DOCUMENT_GENERATED event
generateAndStore uses invoiceNumber/quoteNumber for file naming
generatePDFBuffer acquires and releases browser from pool
generatePDFBuffer uses template print options when templateAst provided
generatePDFBuffer uses default A4 options when no templateAst
getInvoiceHtml resolves template from client → tenant default → first available
getInvoiceHtml enriches data with tenant client (logo, address)
getInvoiceHtml throws when invoice not found
getQuoteHtml uses explicit templateAst when provided
getQuoteHtml resolves standard template by code
getQuoteHtml falls back to resolveQuoteTemplateAst when no explicit template
getQuoteHtml throws when quote not found
getDocumentHtml renders block content via convertBlockContentToHTML
getDocumentHtml renders markdown content via marked
getDocumentHtml renders plain text with HTML escaping
renderQuotePreview returns HTML and CSS for quote
renderQuotePreview throws when quote not found
server-render inlines document images as base64 when knex provided
server-render adds base href tag from NEXTAUTH_URL
AST wiring test: consolidated service imports evaluator and renderer
Print settings test: resolves print options from AST correctly
Constructor throws when tenant is empty
Build compiles with no TypeScript errors in PDF generation paths
